title: FRAGATA: Semantic Retrieval of HPC Support Tickets via Hybrid RAG over 20 Years of Request Tracker History

problem.description: RT version 4.4.1 has severe limitations in its built-in search: it does not index the full ticket body, is case-sensitive, does not tolerate typos, does not normalize morphological variants, and lacks any notion of semantic similarity
problem.impact: Both veteran and newly onboarded staff struggle to locate relevant past cases, leading to duplicated effort, loss of institutional knowledge, and increased mean resolution time

solution.name: Fragata
additional_features: Integration of complementary sources (technical documentation, scientific application manuals, repositories)
Deployment on hybrid architecture (virtual machine and FinisTerrae III supercomputer)
Incremental ingestion and hot-reload of the search engine

contributions: Design of a reproducible protocol for extraction, normalization, and chunking of RT's SQL history
Hybrid retrieval architecture with weighted fusion and query-aware reranking
Hot-swap mechanism that guarantees continuous availability during re-indexing
Operational integration with an HPC scheduler to offload expensive ingestion stages without penalizing service latency

concepts: Embeddings as numerical vector representations of text meaning

deployment_context.duration: Over 20 years of Request Tracker history
